name: transition-from-review
description: Adding outgoing transitions from a review step instead of using verdicts
why: The engine reads the verdicts map on review steps to determine routing. Transitions from review steps are ignored — the workflow routes via verdicts only, so the transition silently does nothing.
fix: Remove transitions with from: review-step-id. Define routing in the verdicts map: { "approve": { "target": "next" }, "revise": { "target": "prev" } }.
expectedError: review steps must not have outgoing transitions
